bias.analyst: The opening surge was a trap - full rejection back inside the range within minutes. The new support shelf folded instead of absorbing, which answered the question: no longs. Theo passed on chasing the high and that patience just paid. Now the real test: the big floor below is next. If it absorbs again, this is a range day; if it breaks after the half-hour classification, the with-trend short becomes the play. Sitting on hands through the whipsaw - this is exactly what the first thirty minutes are for.
bias.commentator: OH! The opening attack was a COUNTER-TRAP! Theo's striker pulled up one step from their box - and seconds later the away side broke the other way at full speed, straight through our forward line which simply collapsed. The manager called it from the bench: DON'T SHOOT. Now everyone falls back to the main stronghold where yesterday's heroes made their stand. Hold, and this match resets to midfield chess. Break, and we flip sides and join the counter-attack. What an opening three minutes!

events.analyst: Theo Live is now public. From here on, session events appear in this feed with a delay - wins, losses, and the days we sit on our hands.
events.commentator: Welcome to the grounds! The gates are open for the first time. Pre-season record is on the board - including the losses. We hide nothing here, folks.

events.analyst: Market open. Theo watches the first 30 minutes before committing - the [indicator] decides which playbook is valid today.
events.commentator: KICKOFF! The bell rings and we're underway. Theo holds its shape for the first half hour - no wild lunges before the game shows its pattern.
